result.stderr:
FCSBenchmark.Generator 0.3.15+10a847b562
Copyright (C) 2026 FCSBenchmark.Generator

  -c, --checkouts         (Default: .artifacts) Base directory for git checkouts

  --forceFcsBuild         (Default: false) Force-build git-sourced FCS versions
                          even if the binaries already exist

  -i                      Path to the input file describing the benchmark.
                          Supports multiple values.

  --sample                Use a predefined sample benchmark with the given name.
                          Supports multiple values.

  --dry-run               If set, prepares the benchmark and prints the
                          commandline to run it, then exits

  --cleanup               (Default: false) If set, removes the checkout
                          directory afterwards. Doesn't apply to local codebases

  -n, --iterations        (Default: 1) Number of iterations to run

  -w, --warmups           (Default: 1) Number of warmups to run

  -v, --verbose           (Default: false) Verbose logging. Includes output of
                          all preparation steps.

  --official              A publicly available FCS NuGet version to test.
                          Supports multiple values.

  --local                 A local NuGet source to use for testing
                          locally-generated FCS nupkg files. Supports multiple
                          values.

  --github                An FSharp repository&revision, in the form
                          'owner/repo/revision' eg.
                          'dotnet/fsharp/5a72e586278150b7aea4881829cd37be872b204
                          3. Supports multiple values.

  --record-otel-jaeger    (Default: false) If enabled, records and sends
                          OpenTelemetry trace to a localhost Jaeger instance
                          using the default port

  --parallel-analysis     (Default: 0) Off = parallel analysis off, On =
                          parallel analysis on, Compare = runs two benchmarks
                          with parallel analysis on and off

  --gc                    (Default: 0) Whether to use 'workstation' or 'server'
                          GC, or 'compare'.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
